sentences.english: I wanted to drink water.
sentences.hindi: मैं पानी पीना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted to drink water

sentences.english: She wanted to become a doctor.
sentences.hindi: वह डॉक्टर बनना चाहती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she wanted to become a doctor

sentences.english: He wanted a promotion.
sentences.hindi: उसे promotion चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: he wanted a promotion

sentences.english: We wanted to go outside.
sentences.hindi: हम बाहर जाना चाहते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: we wanted to go outside

sentences.english: They wanted to finish that work.
sentences.hindi: वे उस काम को खत्म करना चाहते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they wanted to finish that work

sentences.english: I wanted to learn English.
sentences.hindi: मैं English सीखना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted to learn english

sentences.english: I did not want to go there.
sentences.hindi: मैं वहाँ नहीं जाना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i did not want to go there

sentences.english: She did not want that book.
sentences.hindi: उसे वह किताब नहीं चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she did not want that book

sentences.english: We did not want more training.
sentences.hindi: हमें और training नहीं चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: we did not want more training

sentences.english: He did not want to accept that offer.
sentences.hindi: वह उस offer को accept नहीं करना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: he did not want to accept that offer

sentences.english: They did not want to join that project.
sentences.hindi: वे उस project में शामिल नहीं होना चाहते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they did not want to join that project

sentences.english: I did not want any trouble.
sentences.hindi: मुझे कोई परेशानी नहीं चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: i did not want any trouble

sentences.english: Did you want tea?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हें चाय चाहिए थी?
sentences.pronunciation: did you want tea

sentences.english: Did he want to go there?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह वहाँ जाना चाहता था?
sentences.pronunciation: did he want to go there

sentences.english: Did they want any help?
sentences.hindi: क्या उन्हें मदद चाहिए थी?
sentences.pronunciation: did they want any help

sentences.english: Did she want to submit the report?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह report submit करना चाहती थी?
sentences.pronunciation: did she want to submit the report

sentences.english: Did the manager want to end the meeting early?
sentences.hindi: क्या manager ने meeting जल्दी खत्म करनी चाही?
sentences.pronunciation: did the manager want to end the meeting early

sentences.english: Did you want to watch that film?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम उस film को देखना चाहते थे?
sentences.pronunciation: did you want to watch that film

sentences.english: I wanted to discuss this matter with you.
sentences.hindi: मैं इस मामले पर आपसे बात करना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted to discuss this matter with you

sentences.english: We wanted to give you an update on the project.
sentences.hindi: हम आपको project की update देना चाहते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: we wanted to give you an update on the project

sentences.english: The client wanted a detailed proposal.
sentences.hindi: Client एक detailed proposal चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: the client wanted a detailed proposal

sentences.english: As a child, I wanted to become a pilot.
sentences.hindi: बचपन में मैं pilot बनना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: as a child i wanted to become a pilot

sentences.english: I always wanted to work in this field.
sentences.hindi: मैं हमेशा से इस field में काम करना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i always wanted to work in this field

sentences.english: She always wanted to grow within the company.
sentences.hindi: वह हमेशा company में आगे बढ़ना चाहती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she always wanted to grow within the company

sentences.english: I wanted to call you but I was busy.
sentences.hindi: मैं तुम्हें call करना चाहता था पर busy था।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted to call you but i was busy

sentences.english: I wanted to go to the gym but it rained.
sentences.hindi: मैं gym जाना चाहता था लेकिन बारिश हो गई।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted to go to the gym but it rained

sentences.english: We wanted to eat at that restaurant but it was closed.
sentences.hindi: हम उस restaurant में खाना चाहते थे पर वह बंद था।
sentences.pronunciation: we wanted to eat at that restaurant but it was closed

sentences.english: I just wanted to say thank you.
sentences.hindi: मैं बस शुक्रिया कहना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i just wanted to say thank you

sentences.english: She said she wanted to meet you.
sentences.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह तुमसे मिलना चाहती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she said she wanted to meet you

sentences.english: I just wanted to inform you about this.
sentences.hindi: मैं बस आपको इसके बारे में बताना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i just wanted to inform you about this

drills.title: Wanted vs Want — Present vs Past Comparison

sentences.english: I want tea now.
sentences.hindi: मैं अभी चाय चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i want tea now

sentences.english: I wanted tea yesterday.
sentences.hindi: मैं कल चाय चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i wanted tea yesterday

sentences.english: She wants to study now, but she wanted to play earlier.
sentences.hindi: वह अभी पढ़ना चाहती है, पहले खेलना चाहती थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she wants to study now but she wanted to play earlier

sentences.english: He wanted to move to a bigger house.
sentences.hindi: वह एक बड़े घर में जाना चाहता था।
sentences.pronunciation: he wanted to move to a bigger house

sentences.english: They wanted a better future.
sentences.hindi: वे एक बेहतर भविष्य चाहते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they wanted a better future

sentences.english: Did you want to come with us?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम हमारे साथ आना चाहते थे?
sentences.pronunciation: did you want to come with us
